visual_summary: A shimmer button with an animated effect, suitable for use when loading or hiding data. Use when needing to add visual feedback for loading states or animation effects.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics: Name: Shimmer Button Demo Description: A shimmer button with an animated effect, suitable for use when loading or hiding data. Use when needing to add visual feedback for loading states or animation effects. Style: animated, loading Interactions: clickable, hover Tags: button, animation, loading Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): import { ShimmerButton } from "@/registry/magicui/shimmer-button" export default function ShimmerButtonDemo() { return ( Shimmer Button ) }
